---
title: "🏗️ Architectures"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Attention, transformers, and the model architectures everything else is built from.

::: {.grid .home-cards}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .home-card}
### [👁️ Attention](notes/architectures/attention/index.qmd)
Scaled dot-product attention, multi-head splits, cross-attention, and masking — derived from one idea instead of memorized as a formula.
:::

:::
